test.name: Dropdown operation

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a04596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a8225] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a5e43] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a3197] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a2060] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a094a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0c8e6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0942d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0edcf4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a092b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a093a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aacd3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aac7a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aaebca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a5072ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a50fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4d75c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]
kw.status:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select Radio Button
kw.doc: Sets the radio button group ``group_name`` to ``value``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

test.status:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (747, 665). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=150.0.7871.47); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea865+152a5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4ea8c0+15300] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a04596d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a8225] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a5e43] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a3197] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0a2060] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a094a58] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0c8e6a] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0942d6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a0edcf4] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a092b3c] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff69a093a53] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aacd3a1+5f7de1] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aac7a3b+5f247b] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69aaebca5+6166e5] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a5072ae+31cee] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a50fe3c+3a87c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4404+1ee44] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4f4594+1efd4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff69a4d75c7+2007] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ff8eadfe957+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ff8ec967c1c+2c]
